Summary: Login fails after password reset — returns 200 403
Details:
Steps:
1. Reset password via auth portal (https://auth.example.com/reset)
2. Attempt login with new credentials
3. Observe 403 Forbidden
Expected: Successful login
 Actual: ERR_AUTH_STALE_TOKEN
Affects Chrome 120*, Firefox, Safari. Related to PR-891 (https://jira.example.com/PR-891). The H2O auth header contains a stale nonce.
